title: Wynndows
description: My personal Wynncraft mod pack makes a variety of tweaks to the game's visuals and some utilities for Wynncraft (with a music pack that I made in music software and added VST instruments to).
body:
I saw there wasn't a lot of Wynncraft modpacks as so I took it upon myself to compile some of my favorite mods to create a Wynncraft modpack.

I've now made my own sounds and instruments to create a fully custom music pack for Wynncraft, I hope yall enjoy it.

All credits to the mod makers used in this modpack.
